title: lithocarpus dolichocarpus
intro: Lithocarpus dolichocarpus, also known as the Taiwan Lithocarpus or Taiwanese copper beech, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family Fagaceae. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus dolichocarpus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving cognitive function. Lithocarpus dolichocarpus can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent various diseases.
